allow: Bash(wsl -e sudo ip link set dev eth0 mtu 1400:*)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5672 | Select-Object -Property ComputerName, RemotePort, TcpTestSucceeded")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 15672 | Select-Object -Property ComputerName, RemotePort, TcpTestSucceeded")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ''C:\\ProgramData\\Docker\\config'' | Out-Null; Write-Host ''Directory created or already exists''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "$json = @''{  ""debug"": false,  ""experimental"": false}''@ | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(''C:\\ProgramData\\Docker\\config\\daemon.json'', $json, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Host ''Created daemon.json without BOM''")

Bash(git -C "C:\\projects\\DDD\\DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add SqlServer package to EfCore provider and fix solution folder

- Add Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer to BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.EfCore
  \(provides migrations support as the EF Core provider package\)
- Fix solution folder nesting for EfCore project under "01. BuildingBlocks"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/projects/DDD/DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: prevent build hang when Docker Desktop is not running

- Add timeout parameter to ensure-docker.ps1 script \(default 60s\)
- Add MSBuild timeout \(90s\) to EnsureDockerServices target
- Remove interactive ReadKey that would hang CI/non-interactive builds
- Add SKIP_DOCKER_CHECK environment variable to bypass Docker check
- Add helpful error messages with fix instructions
- Add documentation for the Docker auto-start behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\projects\\DDD\\DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: update event flow diagrams for transaction-aware publishing

- Show TransactionBehavior wrapping in flow diagrams
- Document that integration events publish AFTER commit
- Add rollback scenario explanations
- Update phase-2, phase-3, phase-5 docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\projects\\DDD\\DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add domain event handlers that queue integration events

- Create PatientCreatedEventHandler and PatientSuspendedEventHandler
- Handlers log events and queue integration events via IUnitOfWork
- Remove direct QueueIntegrationEvent calls from command handlers
- Add 9 tests for event handler behavior
- Update docs to reflect domain event handler pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\projects\\DDD\\DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add nested transaction support and comprehensive tests

- EfCoreUnitOfWork tracks transaction ownership with _ownsTransaction flag
- Nested commands reuse existing transaction instead of starting new one
- Only outer command commits/rollbacks the transaction
- Add 5 EfCoreUnitOfWork tests for nested transaction scenarios
- Add 9 TransactionBehavior tests including nested command scenario
- Update docs with nested transaction handling sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\projects\\DDD\\DDD" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: replace _ownsTransaction flag with _transactionDepth counter

The boolean flag got overwritten when nested commands called
BeginTransactionAsync on the same scoped UnitOfWork instance.
The depth counter correctly tracks nesting level:
- Increments on BeginTransaction
- Decrements on CloseTransaction  
- Only commits when depth reaches 0 \(outermost call\)

- Add tests that verify nested transactions commit correctly
- Update docs to reflect depth counter approach

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
